message:
fix: make critical issue badge apply severity filter on Alerts page (#8740)

When on the Alerts page, clicking the health badge now applies the
corresponding severity filter (critical or warning) via global filters
instead of being non-responsive. On other pages, it navigates to
/alerts with the filter pre-applied.

Fixes #8725

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
